The user is asking me to identify the hardware and software specifications of this machine. I should run some commands to gather this information.

arguments.command:
echo "=== OS ===" && uname -a && echo -e "
=== Kernel ===" && cat /proc/version 2>/dev/null || uname -r && echo -e "
=== CPU ===" && lscpu | head -20 && echo -e "
=== Memory ===" && free -h && echo -e "
=== Disk ===" && df -h / | tail -1 && echo -e "
=== GPU (if any) ===" && (lspci | grep -i vga || lspci | grep -i nvidia) 2>/dev/null
